title: Pisonia gigantocarpa

intro: Pisonia gigantocarpa, also known as the 'Giant Pisonia', is a large, flowering tree native to the Pacific Islands. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and inflammation, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties.
